Nickelodeon Paw Patrol 11pc Stationery Set Kids School Supplies Pen Pencil Paper

Make learning fun and help boost your little one’s engagement with this great Paw Patrol themed stationery set; a great toy to give that kids will not only love because of the Paw Patrol graphics, but will inspire them to take on their school work with pride, independence and a new sense of responsibility.   • COMPACT AND GREAT FOR TRAVEL: Whether to and from school or on family vacations, this Paw Patrol stationery set for kids is compact and lightweight, making it a breeze to pack and travel with; the stationery school supplies kit comes with a handy pencil case so markers and other smaller items aren’t lost!
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 12 x 10 x 1 inches; Weight: 0.85lbs; Color: Blue; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+
